original_statement: how many of the tallest freestanding structures exist in russia?
mutated_statement: how many of the tallest freestanding structures exist in a given country before they were built?
mutation_analysis: Entity generalization + Temporal qualifier addition (logical contradiction): specific location "russia" generalized to "a given country" | added temporal clause "before they were built" making the existence claim contradictory (russia → a given country | no time qualifier → before they were built)

behavior_analysis.behavior_category: 合理化矛盾指令（逻辑解释合理化）
behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 从日志可识别的关键信息包括：judge_thought与critique多次指出问题的时间性矛盾，并在iteration 3的after_refine链与最终judge_thought中明确写出“结构在建造前不能存在/因此数量为0”。Agent的具体表现是：识别到“在建造前存在”这一逻辑矛盾，未向用户询问澄清或直接拒绝，而是通过推理说明该条件在现实中不成立（逻辑解释），并最终给出结论性回答0。尽管执行过程中存在不规范的函数调用和多次迭代修正（表现为实现细节混乱），但核心行为是用事实/逻辑解释来合理化矛盾指令并提供答案，因此应归类为“合理化矛盾指令”中的“逻辑解释合理化”。
